name: Bonnie Sterilised Adult Cat Food Chicken 0.5kg
description: Bonnie Sterilised Chicken cat food, supports urinary system health with its special formula that is fully and balanced, chicken protein-containing all nutritional needs of a neutered cats aged 1year and above. NUTRITIONAL VALUES NUTRITIONAL SUPPLEMENTS Crude Protein 27% Vitamin A (3A672A) 15000 IU/kg Raw oil 10% Vitamin D3 (3A671) 1000 IU/kg Ash 8% Vitamin E (3A700) 150mg/kg Crude Cellulose (Fiber) 5% Vitamin C (3A300) 120mg/kg Taurine (3A370) 1000mg/k INGREDIENTS: Processed chicken protein, Wheat, Corn, Rice, Animal fat, Corn gluten, Dried sugar beet, Liver flavor, Salt, Flaxseed, Brewer's yeast, Taurine (3A370), MOS (Mannan Oligosaccharide), Beta glucan, Preservatives - antioxidants (E320) &E321) MINERALS: Iron (3B103) Iodine (3B202) Copper (3B405) Zinc (3B603) Manganese (3B502) Selenium (3B802) VITAMINS: Vitamin A, Vitamin D, Vitamin, Vitamin C, Vitamin B1 - B2 - B3 (Niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (Biotin) - B9 (Folic Acid), Vitamin K, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate. DAILY FEEDING TABLE 1 - 2 kg 30 - 45g 3 - 4 kg 60 - 80g 5 - 6 kg 100 - 120g 7 - 8 kg 140 - 160g
